---
title: "Auction Theory Deep Dive"
description: "Revenue equivalence, Myerson optimal, combinatorial, GSP, empirical auction methods."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="kicker"><span data-topic-count="auction-theory-deep-dive"></span> TUTORIALS</div>
  <h1>Auction Theory Deep Dive</h1>
  <p class="lead">Revenue equivalence, Myerson optimal, combinatorial, GSP, empirical auction methods.</p>
</div>
```
